name: larena/licensing
description: Runtime licensing layer that decides which package, bundle and capability features are available to a site, with signed entitlement snapshots, trial restrictions, subscription/expiration policies, environment-aware licenses, limits and explainable locks.

scripts.validate:larena: @php -r 'foreach (["module.yaml", "src/Contracts/Capability.php", "src/Contracts/EntitlementSnapshot.php", "src/Contracts/LicensingRuntime.php", "src/Contracts/LicenseDecision.php", "src/Enums/EntitlementStatus.php", "src/Enums/LicenseDecisionStatus.php"] as $file) { if (!is_file($file)) { fwrite(STDERR, "Missing {$file}\n"); exit(1); } } echo "Larena licensing contract skeleton is valid.\n";'
scripts.evidence:check: test -f docs/project-management/evidence/runtime-security/batch-0/licensing-repository-transition/README.md && test -f docs/project-management/evidence/runtime-security/batch-0/licensing-repository-transition/file-map.json && test -f docs/project-management/evidence/runtime-security/batch-0/licensing-repository-transition/graph-sync-proposal.json && test -f docs/project-management/evidence/runtime-security/batch-0/licensing-repository-transition/independent-review.md && test -f docs/project-management/evidence/runtime-security/batch-1/licensing/implementation-summary.md && test -f docs/project-management/evidence/runtime-security/batch-1/licensing/tests.md && test -f docs/project-management/evidence/runtime-security/batch-1/licensing/smoke.md && test -f docs/project-management/evidence/runtime-security/batch-1/licensing/file-map.json && test -f docs/project-management/evidence/runtime-security/batch-1/licensing/deviations.json && test -f docs/project-management/evidence/runtime-security/batch-1/licensing/graph-sync-proposal.json && test -f docs/project-management/evidence/runtime-security/batch-1/licensing/code-review-feedback.md
